description.en: Get full details for a specific place by its Google Place ID, including phone number, website, address, hours, and ratings.
description.de: Vollständige Details zu einem bestimmten Ort anhand seiner Google Place ID abrufen, einschließlich Telefonnummer, Website, Adresse, Öffnungszeiten und Bewertungen.
description.es: Get full details for a specific place by its Google Place ID, including phone number, website, address, hours, and ratings.
description.fr: Get full details for a specific place by its Google Place ID, including phone number, website, address, hours, and ratings.
description.ro: Get full details for a specific place by its Google Place ID, including phone number, website, address, hours, and ratings.
description.it: Get full details for a specific place by its Google Place ID, including phone number, website, address, hours, and ratings.

vars.API_KEY: env:GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Google Cloud Console at console.cloud.google.com. Enable the Places API (New).

description.en: The Google Place ID (e.g. ChIJ...). Get this from Places Text Search.
description.de: Die Google Place ID (z.B. ChIJ...). Diese kann über die Ortssuche abgerufen werden.
